headline: Assessing PPG Industries (PPG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Growth Strategy Progress
summary: PPG Industries (PPG) is back in focus after recent trading data showed the stock moving higher over the past month and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess its valuation and business mix. See our latest analysis for PPG Industries. At a share price of $118.24, PPG’s recent momentum is clear, with a 30 day share price return of 11.15% and a 13.31% share price return year to date, even as the 5 year total shareholder return is down 23.37%. If this kind of rebound has you thinking...
